title: The Age of The Sovereignpreneur Has Begun
summary: Jordan Urbs argues that the combination of Bitcoin (money sovereignty) and AI (labor leverage) enables a new class of independent builders called sovereignpreneurs. He presents a framework called the sovereignty stack and advocates for decentralized ownership of platforms and tools rather than dependence on centralized services.
